title: micromeria varia subsp. thymoides
intro: Micromeria varia subsp. thymoides is a subspecies of the Micromeria varia plant, also known as the thyme-leaved mint or mountain mint, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Micromeria varia subsp. thymoides include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as having antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage and certain diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, ease digestive issues, and support respiratory health.
